mapper.select: SELECT coupon_id AS couponId, coupon_name AS couponName, discount_value AS discountValue, discount_type AS discountType, duration_days AS durationDays, is_issued_all AS isIssuedAll, created_at AS createdAt FROM coupon ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon ( coupon_id, coupon_name, discount_type, discount_value, duration_days, is_issued_all, created_at ) VALUES ( #{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{discountType}, #{discountValue}, #{durationDays}, FALSE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET coupon_name = #{couponName}, discount_type = #{discountType}, discount_value = #{discountValue}, duration_days = #{durationDays} WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon ( user_id, coupon_id, is_used, expiry_date, issued_date ) SELECT u.user_id, c.coupon_id, FALSE, DATE_ADD( CURDATE(), INTERVAL c.duration_days DAY ), CURDATE() FROM USERS u INNER JOIN coupon c ON c.coupon_id = #{couponId} WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_coupon uc WHERE uc.user_id = u.user_id AND uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id )
